description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named changelog-validator that runs on pull requests affecting the docs/changelog.md file. The workflow should have two jobs: validate-unreleased and validate-release. The validate-unreleased job checks for an Unreleased entry in the changelog when the 'release' label is not set, while the validate-release job checks for a version entry in the changelog when the 'release' label is set, using Python 3.11 and semver for version parsing.
